ci_commands_discovered.reason: bun not available in container, npm can't install deps due to 'catalog:' protocol
bun not available, dependencies not installed
bun not available, dependencies not installed

p2p_enrichment.notes: The repo uses bun with catalog: protocol which npm doesn't support. The Dockerfile doesn't install bun or run 'bun install'. Without modifying the Dockerfile, we cannot run the repo's actual CI commands. The existing tests in test_outputs.py use Node.js directly to parse TypeScript files without type checking, which is sufficient for this task's validation.

validate.notes: All core validation checks passed: Docker build succeeded, NOP test reward=0 (4 fail-to-pass tests correctly fail on buggy base), Gold test reward=1 (all 12 tests pass after fix). Rubric judge requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY which is unavailable in this environment (returns 0.5 indeterminate). The gold solution correctly applies the PR 19426 changes: fileTree defaults to opened:false with width 200, sidebar width unchanged at 344.
